rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL DOUGLAS ET AL VS. DAHLIA HOTEL, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 3, 2015, line 2. rulings.Case Title: JORGE MESTAYER VS. THE JORGE AND DARLING MESTAYER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 3, 2015, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT JORGE MESTAYER MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED, allegations subject to this motion (Notice of Motion 1:15-20) are not irrelevant, false, or improper; or not drawn or filed in conformity with the laws of this state. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JORGE MESTAYER VS. THE JORGE AND DARLING MESTAYER TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 3, 2015, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT JORGE MESTAYER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer, First Amended Cross-Complaint sufficiently alleges facts giving rise to causes of action for elder abuse, fraud, breach of fiduciary duty and IIED within the statute of limitations and after Cross-Complainant was 65 years old. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KURT LESSWING VS. COURTNEY SEASHOLS **(regular civil case)**
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 3, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT COURTNEY SEASHOLS MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED, paragraph 17h is stricken with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege the basis for recovery of attorney's fees in this action post-judgment. Paragraph 51 on the Lease does not provide for recovery of attorneys' fees in an unlawful detainer based on landlord's notice of termination of tenancy. Plaintiff shall file and serve an amended complaint within 5 days of notice of entry of order. If no amended complaint is filed, Defendant shall file an answer within 5 days thereafter. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDMUND P. D''ANDRIA III VS. JOHN ORISHYN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Posession; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 3, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT JOHN ORISHYN Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant posting $3,000 with the Court no later than December 3, 2015 by 4:00 p.m.; (2) Defendant filing, serving and providing a courtesy copy of opposition to November 9, 2015 ex-parte application by 9:00 a.m. on December 3, 2015. Additionally, Defendant's counsel of record shall remit to Plaintiff's counsel $3,385 by December 18, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LOUIS SMITH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 3, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT LOUIS SMITH Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel OFF CALENDAR. November 19, 2015 order required personal service of the Motion. Proof of Service on file indicates service by mail. No proof of service for the OST on file. Additionally, counsel failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. = (501/REQ)
